case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. MICHAEL BREENE BONDS JR.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
